scripts.build: npm run build -w @app/shared && npm run build -w @app/api-gateway && npm run build -w @app/identity-service && npm run build -w @app/catalog-service && npm run build -w @app/reservation-service && npm run build -w @app/review-service
scripts.dev: npm run build -w @app/shared && concurrently -n shared,gateway,identity,catalog,reservation,review -c white,blue,green,magenta,cyan,yellow "npm run dev -w @app/shared" "npm run dev -w @app/api-gateway" "npm run dev -w @app/identity-service" "npm run dev -w @app/catalog-service" "npm run dev -w @app/reservation-service" "npm run dev -w @app/review-service"
